notes: v3 drops any user_annotation with an args.finished key; these async marker ranges otherwise make FSDP sums/coverage look like whole-step spans.
sum_ms is inclusive unless stated otherwise; coverage_ms is interval-union wall coverage for CPU/user/autograd ranges.
Kernel and HIP runtime attribution uses the innermost active CPU user/autograd interval at event start; unattributed or ProfilerStep-only runtime is a candidate wrapper/unwind bucket.
